positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical celestial forest landscape. The scene features stylized, bioluminescent flora and ancient, geometric tree trunks forming a central, cohesive silhouette. Incorporate deep indigo blues, vibrant cyan, and ethereal pops of magenta light emanating from glowing crystalline pods and exotic foliage. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly contrasting, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use a highly detailed, art deco/mystic nature style with clean, graphic outlines and dramatic rim lighting that emphasizes the silhouette against a nebula-filled background. Minimalistic, high-impact, repeating pattern potential.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low resolution, disfigured, cropped, realistic photo, messy
